title: hieracium bastrerianum subsp. pramolicum
intro: Hieracium bastrerianum subsp. pramolicum, also known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. The medicinal properties of Hieracium bastrerianum subsp. pramolicum include its ability to act as a diuretic, reducing inflammation, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. It is also believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium bastrerianum subsp. pramolicum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although its effectiveness and safety as a treatment should be further studied and confirmed.
